```python
# Save as get_github_trending.py and run: python get_github_trending.py
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

URL = "https://github.com/trending"
resp = requests.get(URL, headers={"User-Agent": "python-requests/3.x"})
resp.raise_for_status()

soup = BeautifulSoup(resp.text, "html.parser")
repos = []
for item in soup.select("article.Box-row")[:5]:
    a = item.select_one("h2 a")
    if not a:
        continue
    # repo path: "owner / repo"
    repo_path = " ".join(a.get_text(strip=True).split())
    repo_path = repo_path.replace(" / ", "/").replace(" ", "")
    description_tag = item.select_one("p.col-9")
    description = description_tag.get_text(strip=True) if description_tag else ""
    star_tag = item.select_one("a[href$=\"/stargazers\"]")
    stars = star_tag.get_text(strip=True) if star_tag else ""
    repos.append({"repo": repo_path, "description": description, "stars": stars})

for i, r in enumerate(repos, 1):
    print(f"{i}. {r['repo']}")
    if r['description']:
        print(f"   {r['description']}")
    if r['stars']:
        print(f"   Stars: {r['stars']}")
```
